creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Wed Oct 30 22:45:37 2013
New Revision: 332186
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332186

Log:
  - Add stage support
  - Add a pkg-plist file
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/183497
  Submitted by:	Kimmo Paasiala <kpaasial@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/devel/bin86/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/bin86/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/bin86/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/bin86/Makefile	Wed Oct 30 22:33:22 2013	(r332185)
+++ head/devel/bin86/Makefile	Wed Oct 30 22:45:37 2013	(r332186)
@@ -6,21 +6,17 @@ PORTVERSION=	0.16.19
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.debath.co.uk/dev86/
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	kpaasial@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	16-bit assembler and loader
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
-
-MAN1=		as86.1 ld86.1
-PORTDOCS=	ChangeLog README README-0.4
-PLIST_FILES=	${BINS:C/..\//bin\//g}
+DOCS=	ChangeLog README README-0.4
 
 CONFLICTS=	bcc-[0-9]* dev86-[0-9]*
 
 BINS=		as/as86 ld/ld86 ld/objchop ld/catimage ld/objdump86
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 .if ${ARCH} == "ia64" || ${ARCH} == "powerpc" || ${ARCH} == "sparc64"
@@ -28,13 +24,11 @@ BROKEN=		Does not compile on ia64, power
 .endif
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/*1 ${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/*1 ${STAGEDIR}${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1
 .for i in ${BINS}
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
 .endfor
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS} ${DOCSDIR}
-.endif
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${DOCS} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Added: head/devel/bin86/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/bin86/pkg-plist	Wed Oct 30 22:45:37 2013	(r332186)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+bin/as86
+bin/catimage
+bin/ld86
+bin/objchop
+bin/objdump86
+man/man1/as86.1.gz
+man/man1/ld86.1.gz
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/ChangeLog
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README-0.4
+%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrmtry %%DOCSDIR%%
_______________________________________________
